title: microsorum siamense
intro: Microsorum siamense, also known as Siam fern or Thai royal fern, is a type of perennial fern native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand and other tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microsorum siamense include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
